nasb.text: and will hand Him over to the Gentiles to mock and scourge and crucify Him, and on the third day He will be raised up.”

esv.text: and deliver him over to the Gentiles to be mocked and flogged and crucified, and he will be raised on the third day.”

cnv.text: 把他交給外族人凌辱、鞭打，並且釘在十字架上。然而第三天他要復活。”

ccb.text: 把祂交给外族人，受嘲弄、鞭打，被钉在十字架上。但第三天祂必复活。”

csbs.text: 并且要把他交给外邦人去戏弄、鞭打、钉上十字架；然后在第三天，他要复活。”
